title: Junkers Come Here
original_title: ユンカース・カム・ヒア
overview: Hiromi appears on the outside to be a mature, resilient girl, but on the inside she feels like she's falling apart.  She is having troubles at home mainly because of her parents wanting to separate.  Her dog, Junkers, tries to comfort her in ways no other dog can.  You see, he can talk and grant her 3 wishes.
